title: Psychotria flexuosa
intro: Psychotria flexuosa, also known as flexuosa or flexuosa Psychotria, is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Psychotria flexuosa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant are teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as capsules and extracts, which are used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
